meaning: n.议员竞选演说坛,选举程序
examples: Most candidates will be out on the hustings this week.
Now do not let them lure you to the hustings my dear Mr. Brooke.
She has agreed, though, to attend one of the election hustings, in Chiswick a week before the election.
Plaid said it would hold public leadership debates for the first time, as well as internal hustings.
Mrs Hutchings' place at the hustings was filled by local Tory MP George Hollingbery.
